name: サンド＆キスマイの気になるマン
original_name: サンド＆キスマイの気になるマン
overview:
‘Sand & Kis-My-Ft2’s Curious Man’ is a variety programme broadcast on the TV Asahi network since 6 April 2026. It is commonly known as ‘Curious Man’.

The programme is a compilation of the series ‘Can You Do It for 100,000 Yen?’, which aired from 4 October 2017 (late on 3 October) to 9 March 2026, the Kis-My-Ft2 10th-anniversary special ‘Can We Do It for Kis-My-Ft2’s 10th Anniversary? We Went Behind the Scenes of TV Asahi’s Popular Shows – Nearly 3-Hour Special’, as well as the pilot episodes of ‘If You Had XX Million Yen, You Could Do XX, Right?’ and ‘If You Had 10,000 Yen, You Could Do XX, Right?’.
